Panax ginseng, also known as Asian ginseng, is a perennial plant native to East Asia that has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The health benefits of Panax ginseng include its potential to reduce stress and fatigue, improve mental clarity and memory, and enhance immune function. The bioactive constituents of Panax ginseng include ginsenosides, a class of saponins that have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The most common herbal preparations made with Panax ginseng include capsules, teas, and extracts, as well as ginseng-based combination products with other herbs and adaptogens.
